---
name: Custom issue template
about: Use this template for issues that do not fit the other available categories.
title: ''

---

## Summary
Describe the issue or request.

## Context
Explain any relevant background or why this does not fit another issue template.

## Expected behavior
Describe what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
Describe what actually happened.

## Steps to reproduce
List the steps needed to reproduce the issue, if applicable.

## Additional information
Add links, screenshots, logs, or any other helpful details.
